CVE-2025-31160.title: atop through 2.11.0 allows local users to cause a denial of servi ...
CVE-2025-31160.description: atop through 2.11.0 allows local users to cause a denial of service (e.g., assertion failure and application exit) or possibly have unspecified other impact by running certain types of unprivileged processes while a different user runs atop.
